title: Living in Boulder Vlog 3 - 21 - 2017: 5 Kilometer background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on March 21, 2017, describing a day spent working on his computer building a website with land area data and Google Earth KML files. He discusses his project goals, plans to go deep on the work starting January 2018, and mentions listening to Adam Smith's Wealth of Nations in the background.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to finish the land area page before moving on, sees value in getting it right now while the context is fresh
planning to defer deep-level work until January 1, 2018 when he expects to have more money and courage
believes the land area page will help users understand scale and safety distances
